brand.name: Batta
brand.tagline: Tunisia's first dedicated real-estate auction platform

watchlistPage.title: Your watchlist
watchlistPage.emptyBody: Browse listings and tap the heart to follow auctions as they happen.

accountPage.guestBody: Sign in to view your bids, deposits, and KYC status.

sections.kycBody: Upload your documents to start bidding.

landing.heroTitle: Buy and sell property at the speed of an open auction
landing.heroSubtitle: A fully digital real-estate auction platform for Tunisia — strict legal vetting, accredited on-site inspections, and worldwide access for the diaspora.
landing.trustBar: Partnered with banks, court bailiffs, and accredited real-estate agencies
landing.valuesTitle: Three values we never compromise on

values.transparencyBody: Every bid visible. Every document vetted. Every price public.
values.speedBody: Sell your property in 14 days instead of 6 months. Live auctions 24/7.
values.trustBody: Accredited inspector network, strict KYC, and full legal guarantees.

steps.s1Body: Upload your documents and photos. Our legal team vets within 48 hours.
steps.s2Body: English, sealed-bid, or Dutch — with opening price and hidden reserve.
steps.s3Body: Every bidder is KYC-verified and has locked a 10% deposit before bidding.
steps.s4Body: Accredited notary + land registry filing. All in one place.

landing.auctionTypesTitle: Three auction formats for every kind of property

auctionTypes.englishBody: Price rises with each bid. Fully transparent. Best for residential.
auctionTypes.sealedBody: Every offer is private. Highest wins. Ideal for luxury and commercial.
auctionTypes.dutchBody: Price drops until someone accepts. Speeds up distressed bank assets.

landing.inspectorTitle: Accredited inspector network in every governorate
landing.inspectorBody: Architects, real-estate experts, and lawyers inspect every property before the auction. Detailed technical and legal report plus a live virtual tour for the diaspora.

audience.buyersBody: Discover properties below market price. Bid live from your phone. Full legal guarantees.
audience.sellersBody: Sell faster and more transparently. Reach thousands of verified bidders. Just 3% commission.
audience.banksBody: Liquidate distressed assets at 10–20% higher prices. Dedicated dashboard and monthly reporting.
audience.diasporaBody: Invest back home without flying in. Live virtual tours and fully remote closings.

landing.ctaBody: Join the waitlist and get 0% commission on your first transaction.

auction.extending: Auction extended +10 min (new bid in last 5 min)
auction.depositRequired_long: A 10% deposit is required to participate
auction.depositGated: You need to lock the {amount} TND deposit before bidding.
auction.ownerCannotBid: You can't bid on your own listing.
auction.extendingNotice: +10 minutes added — someone bid in the last 5 minutes.

signup.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.

account.myListingsBody: Manage properties you put up for auction.
account.myWinsBody: Auctions you've won — and what to do next.

inspector.title: Inspector dashboard
inspector.subtitle: Site visits assigned to you. Accept, schedule, and submit your report.
inspector.noWork: No assignments yet. Approved governorates will receive booking requests as listings come in.

wins.title: My wins
wins.sixthOfferStatus: Holding period — 8 days for higher offers
wins.nextStepsBody: Our legal team will reach out to schedule the closing with an accredited notary. Commission (1%) + final payment due before signature.

sixth.windowBody: Until {deadline}, anyone may submit an offer at least 1/6 above the winning bid. The original winner can match.
sixth.needDeposit: You need an active deposit on this auction to submit a higher offer.
sixth.submitted: Offer received. The seller will be notified.
sixth.tooLow: Offer must be at least {min} TND.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: Bidding requires identity verification (legal requirement)
kyc.step3: Proof of financial capacity (bank statement or pay slip)

sell.title: List your property
sell.subtitle: Our legal team reviews every listing within 48 hours.

form.photosHint: Up to 10. The first one is the cover.
form.documentsHint: Title deed, building permit, etc. PDF or photo.

sell.successBody: We'll review your documents within 48 hours. You'll get an email when it's approved or if anything's missing.
sell.kycRequiredBody: Tunisian law requires every seller to complete KYC before listing a property. It takes 24–48 hours.
sell.editSubtitle: Resubmitting puts the listing back into review.
sell.savedBody: Your changes are back in our queue — review takes up to 48 hours.

schedule.title: Schedule the auction
schedule.subtitle: Pick a format, set the opening price, and a window. You can cancel any time before bids start.
schedule.reserveHint: Hidden minimum below which the property will not be sold.
schedule.successBody: Your auction goes live at the start time. We notify you when bids start.
schedule.alreadyHasAuction: This property already has an auction —
schedule.notReady: This listing is still under review. We notify you once it's approved.
